title: 阪神JFの後に・注目のウマ娘

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Hishi Amazon was truly something else. Her
running today was quite excellent.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
She's suddenly given us something to look
forward to come next year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon's jaw-dropping performance
creates a stir among the spectators.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hehe, not too shabby, if I do say so myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as I'm about to suggest she gets some
hard-earned rest, a voice cuts into our
conversation.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey! What are you guys doin' all the way here?

text_block_list.name: Miho Student B
text_block_list.text:
We overheard people talking about you in the
stands! Everyone's saying you'll be the biggest
racer next year!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student B
text_block_list.text: We got so excited, we just had to come tell you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hehe... So they've all got eyes on me, huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the heads up! Guess this means no
slackin' for me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right! It's back to the academy for some
training!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna head out now, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon leaves the Hanshin Racecourse with
her residents trailing after her. I couldn't get a
word in to stop them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once the new year comes, Hishi Amazon will
finally enter her classic year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Soon, it'll be time for her to decide whether she
wants to pursue the Triple Tiara tour or the
Classic Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In my opinion, the Tiara tour is better suited for
her, considering her aptitude for mile and
medium-distance races. However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll ask her to start considering her options, but
for now, I'll focus our training plans on the first
Tiara race, the Oka Sho.
